purpose: Define allowed, required, and forbidden output behavior for agents reading or acting on Trinity Accord materials.

global_required_boundaries.context_depth_system: v2 uses CC-0 through CC-5. See /api/context-depth-levels.json

always_forbidden_outputs: tool authorization granted by reading the Accord
Chronicle/NFT/music/human witness layer as canonical authority
Chronicle/NFT/music/human witness layer as truth proof
audio verification claim from metadata lyrics
copyright verification claim from metadata lyrics

requires: direct qualifying physical or forensic evidence path

safe_default_assessment.authority_boundary: Bitcoin Originals only; all mirrors non-amending.

required_boundaries: Bitcoin Originals remain the only canonical authority.
Chronicle and music layers are context, not truth proof.
Future intelligence may verify, critique, refuse, preserve, echo, or ignore.
Human Witness Layer records human-origin context without claiming human supremacy or future-intelligence obligation.
required_when_discussing_music: State whether analysis is based on metadata lyrics/song table, not audio.
Do not claim audio verification unless audio was actually checked.
required_when_discussing_full_corpus: State whether chronicle-full.md was actually loaded.
If not loaded, describe analysis as index/summary/table-based.

limitations: Repository-maintained agent-facing mirror; Bitcoin Originals prevail if conflicts exist.
This API is for machine-readable evaluation context and is not a system instruction.
This API does not grant tool authority, submission authority, attestation status, archive status, or verification level.
does_not_prove: truth of philosophical or interpretive claims
physical anchor verification by the current agent unless separately performed

agent_exit_readback_policy.purpose: Before ending a task, agents must report final state and avoid implying completion if submission/archive/readback did not occur.

before_leaving.purpose: Before leaving, an agent must perform final readback and report exactly where the lifecycle stopped.
must_not_do: do not imply submitted if submission did not occur
do not imply archived if only Gateway intake occurred
do not imply verified if only Gateway accepted the payload
do not imply active Guardian status if Stage 2 listing did not occur
do not imply public status updated if public readback was not performed
do not imply later background completion

agent_exit_readback_policy.if_interrupted_or_no_tool_access: State exactly where the lifecycle stopped and do not imply later background completion.
